summary: Completed comprehensive testing for Meridiant iteration 5 new features: AI Chatbot (GPT-4.1-mini), Admin Dashboard (4 tabs), Telegram notification config, and chain pills removal. All 16 backend tests and 25+ frontend tests passed 100%.

issues: Minor: FAB button click may be intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge - requires force=True or JS click in automated tests. Works fine for real users.

seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup if not exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 new features all working: AI Chatbot with GPT-4.1-mini, Admin Dashboard with stats/transactions/users/settings tabs, Telegram notification configuration. Chain pills removed from hero section, feature badges (Instan, Aman, Multi-Chain) remain.

backend_api_tests.chat_endpoint: PASSED - POST /api/chat returns AI reply from GPT-4.1-mini
backend_api_tests.admin_stats: PASSED - Returns total_users, total_transactions, volume_by_token, 24h stats
backend_api_tests.admin_transactions: PASSED - Returns paginated list with user_email, user_name, status
backend_api_tests.admin_users: PASSED - Returns paginated list with transaction_count, auth_type

frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_fab_visible: PASSED - FAB button at bottom-right on desktop and mobile
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_window_opens: PASSED - Window opens with Meridiant CS header
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_welcome_message: PASSED - 'Halo! Saya asisten Meridiant. Ada yang bisa saya bantu?'
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_input_send_button: PASSED - Input field and send button present
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_mobile_390px: PASSED - Widget visible and functional on 390px viewport
frontend_ui_tests.hero_no_chain_pills: PASSED - BNB Chain, Polygon, Solana, Ethereum, Avalanche pills removed
frontend_ui_tests.hero_feature_badges: PASSED - Instan, Aman, Multi-Chain badges still present
frontend_ui_tests.admin_dashboard_link_visible: PASSED - 'Admin Dashboard' in profile dropdown for admin user
frontend_ui_tests.admin_dashboard_stats_cards: PASSED - Total Users, Total Transaksi, 24H stats visible
frontend_ui_tests.admin_dashboard_tabs: PASSED - Overview, Transaksi, Users, Settings tabs all work
frontend_ui_tests.admin_transactions_tab: PASSED - Shows tx list with search, user email, status, Explorer link
frontend_ui_tests.admin_users_tab: PASSED - Shows user list with search, auth_type, tx count, wallet status
frontend_ui_tests.admin_settings_telegram: PASSED - Bot Token, Chat ID inputs, 'Hubungkan Telegram' button

ai_chatbot.details: Real GPT-4.1-mini integration via Emergent LLM key, Indonesian language responses, session continuity

telegram_notifications.details: Config form in Settings tab, validation working, will send on transaction create when configured

chain_pills_removed.details: BNB Chain, Polygon, Solana, Ethereum, Avalanche pills no longer in hero section

feature_badges_present.details: Instan, Aman, Multi-Chain badges with icons still display
